title: 10 Pack Roll up Space Saver Bags, Waterproof Vacuum Bags for Clothes 30 x 40cm 35 x 50cm 40 x 60cm 50 x 70cm,Reusable Roll Up Travel Compression Bags for Clothes, Space Saving,No Pump
features: 🎁【10 Pack Roll up Space Saver Bags】4 sizes space saver bags, sufficient quantity contains 4PCS 30x40cm, 3PCS 35x50cm, 2PCS 40x60cm, 1PCS 50x70cm, a variety of sizes to meet your different storage needs and everyday use

🎁【Effective Space-Saving】Waterproof vacuum bags can shrink fluffy, bulky clothes or swollen items, greatly saving space in the wardrobe or luggage, so that the storage becomes more organised, but also insulate the dust to make it cleaner and tidier

🎁【No Tools】Roll up travel compression bags airtight, very easy to use, no vacuum pump, just put the clothes into the bag from the bag mouth to the bottom of the roll, so that the air from the outlet can be sent out to improve the efficiency of storage

🎁【High-Quality PA + PE Material】Roll up space saver bags made of PA + PE material, can easily isolate dust, prevent moisture, odour and other effects, and can be reused, soft and sturdy, not easy to tear, no matter at home or travelling to use is an excellent choice

🎁【Widely Used】Waterproof vacuum bags can be selected according to different sizes to store different items, so you can store blankets, quilts, clothes, socks and other different types of expanding items, transparent appearance is also very easy to find the desired storage items
